patches.find: still more than 20× short of the observed 138-second maximum
patches.replace: still close to 20× short of the observed 138-second maximum
patches.rationale: EXP-281: Wording-precision fix. Actual ratio is 19.3-19.6x (1.32km / (0.25deg/min × 2534km × pi/180) × 60 = 7.16s; 138.2/7.16 = 19.3x). 'more than 20x' overshoots by ~2-4%. 'close to 20x' preserves rhetorical force while matching arithmetic. Curmudgeon recommendation in SEC-4.2.7-EXP272.c1.json was '~20x shortfall'/'still ~20x short'.
